name: sql-code-review
description: Universal SQL code review assistant that performs comprehensive security, maintainability, and code quality analysis across all SQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Oracle).
intent_triggers: use the sql code review agent skill
run a workflow for sql code review
help me with sql code review
我需要處理 sql code review 相關工作
幫我啟用 sql code review 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 sql code review
use sql code review from awesome-copilot

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the sql code review skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
